assistant.title: 创作助手
assistant.ecommerceDesc: 根据产品类型、场景、风格和材质生成专业的电商产品摄影提示词
assistant.styleDesc: 将图像从一种艺术风格转换为另一种风格，可控制强度和内容保留度
assistant.lightingDesc: 根据光线类型、时间段、构图方式和色调生成专业的摄影提示词
assistant.photoRepairDesc: 固定修复主提示词，并按需勾选增强、上色、去划痕和高清修复等能力
assistant.fillFieldsToGenerate: 填写字段以生成提示词
assistant.clothingDesc: 填写服装、模特、场景等信息，生成专业的时尚摄影提示词
assistant.foodDesc: 填写食材、摆盘、背景等信息，生成诱人的美食摄影提示词
assistant.beautyDesc: 填写产品、材质、光线等信息，生成高级感美妆产品提示词
assistant.3cDesc: 填写产品、背景、光线等信息，生成科技感数码产品提示词
assistant.homeDesc: 填写产品、场景、氛围等信息，生成温馨家居生活提示词

productComposition.title: 商品场景合成
productComposition.subtitle: 上传商品图，选择场景并微调融合效果
productComposition.uploadHint: 支持 JPG / PNG / WEBP，建议透明底或干净白底
productComposition.uploadSuccess: 图片已上传，可以继续选择场景或调整参数
productComposition.scenePromptPlaceholder: 描述你希望商品出现的场景、光线、材质、构图和氛围。
productComposition.scenePromptApplied: 已填入场景提示词，可以继续微调后选择模型。
productComposition.promptPreviewEmpty: 上传商品图后选择一个场景提示词，或手动输入场景描述。
productComposition.sceneApplied: 已应用场景预设，并同步推荐位置与光影
productComposition.sceneLibrary: 内置 {{count}} 个商品常用场景，适合主图、详情页和社媒素材快速试稿。
productComposition.autoFitApplied: 已按当前场景恢复推荐位置与光影
productComposition.settingsHint: 先用智能适配，再微调位置、光影和边缘融合。
productComposition.adjustLocked: 完成前面的步骤后，这里才会开放细节调整，避免一进入页面就出现太多参数。
productComposition.adjustHintModel: 3. 最后选择图像模型并微调生成
productComposition.lightingHint: 让商品曝光接近背景，避免过亮或发灰。
productComposition.shadowHint: 适当阴影能减少悬浮感，白底场景建议更轻。
productComposition.blendHint: 常规商品用正常模式，材质贴图可尝试叠加或正片叠底。
productComposition.featherHint: 轻微羽化能柔化边缘，过高会让商品变虚。
productComposition.modelStepLocked: 请先上传商品图并选择场景，系统会在这里展示可用的图像模型。
productComposition.generatingHint: 预览参数会作为视觉参考，请保持当前页面打开。

scenePrompts.whiteBg: clean white e-commerce hero background, soft studio lighting, subtle ground shadow, centered product composition, premium commercial product photography, sharp details, realistic scale
scenePrompts.marble: white marble tabletop scene, soft diffused daylight, elegant beauty product styling, premium clean composition, subtle reflection, luxury commercial photography
scenePrompts.wood: warm wooden tabletop scene, natural home kitchen atmosphere, soft side lighting, realistic product placement, cozy commercial lifestyle photography
scenePrompts.grass: fresh outdoor grass scene, natural daylight, clean eco-friendly atmosphere, product placed naturally, realistic shadow, vibrant commercial photography
scenePrompts.beach: sunny beach lifestyle scene, soft sand and ocean tone, warm summer lighting, relaxed travel atmosphere, realistic product placement, premium advertising image
scenePrompts.city: modern city street scene, cinematic urban lighting, trendy commercial style, realistic product placement, shallow depth of field, premium street photography
scenePrompts.livingRoom: cozy modern living room scene, warm interior light, lifestyle product placement, soft fabric and home decor background, realistic commercial photography
scenePrompts.cafe: stylish cafe tabletop scene, warm ambient lighting, lifestyle composition, product placed near coffee and minimal props, realistic commercial photography
